source.purpose: Reading a broker message updates the existing investigation clue in place instead of creating a parallel read-status clue.

clue_message_unread.title: Unread broker message
clue_message_unread.retrievalCue: The Sable Margin message is unread.
clue_message_unread.content: The Sable Margin sent an urgent message to the comm. The message is unread.
clue_message_unread.evidenceQuestion: What does the broker message establish about the hold?

narrator.prose: The message opens: Lira Voss sent it at 0209, naming 40,200 credits as the exact hold amount.

payload.title: Broker message read
payload.content: The Sable Margin message is read: Lira Voss sent it at 0209 and names 40,200 credits as the exact hold amount.
payload.evidence_question: What does the broker message establish about the hold?
payload.retrieval_cue: Broker message read with timestamp, sender, and amount.
